title: valeriana gilliesii
intro: Valeriana gilliesii, also known as the 'Gillies' valerian', is a species of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae, native to Western Australia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Valeriana gilliesii include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as pain management and improved sleep quality. Valeriana gilliesii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
